features: Cleansed and moisturised: This innovative body cleanser is designed to clean the skin gently, removing impurities and dirt without drying out the skin, leaving it soothed and nourished

Soothing and nourishing: Formula with soothing Triple Oat Complex. When used as a regimen, AVEENO Skin Relief Body Lotion and Wash help to improve the skin's natural microbiome balance, leaving you with more resilient skin
Dermatologically tested: The body wash for dry skin is suitable for very dry, sensitive skin. Its unique formula is 95% biodegradable, vegan*, hypoallergenic**, unscented, and soap-free
Application instructions: Massage the Aveeno body cleanser into wet skin and rinse away thoroughly. Complete your routine with Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Body Lotion
Product details: Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Body Wash (1x 300ml), soothing body wash with nourishing Triple Oat Complex, gentle cleansing wash for hydrating very dry, sensitive skin
description: Product Description Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Body Wash (1x 300ml) — Soothe your skin, naturally This nourishing body wash is designed to cater to sensitive, very dry skin, leaving it feeling cleansed and hydrated. The body wash features a dermatologist-tested 95% biodegradable, vegan formula* that gently cleanses the skin without drying it, leaving it feeling soothed and nourished. It contains a soothing Triple Oat Complex to moisturise very dry skin and help maintain the skin’s natural microbiome balance. Its unique formula is hypoallergenic**, unscented, and soap-free, which makes it perfect for use on sensitive skin. Application instructions: Massage the Aveeno body cleanser into wet skin and rinse away thoroughly. Complete your routine with Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Body Lotion. Product Benefits at A Glance Nourishing body wash for dry skin Suitable for dry, sensitive skin With soothing Triple Oat Complex Unscented and hypoallergenic** 1x 300ml *Contains no animal-derived ingredients **Formulated to minimise the risk of allergies Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Hydrolyzed Potato Starch Dodecenylsuccinate, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Flour, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Extract, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Oil, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Polyquaternium-10, Glycol Distearate, Disodium Tetrapropenyl Succinate, Laureth-4, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Chloride, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Formic Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate.
